commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The PR bumps `github.com/slack-go/slack` from v0.24.0 to v0.25.0 in `go.mod` and `go.sum`.

Reproducibility: yes. for the PR defect: source inspection shows the bump changes table rows to `slack.TableCell` while current code still passes cells to a helper expecting `*slack.RichTextBlock`. I did not run tests under the read-only review constraint.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A repair worker can make a narrow PR-branch fix by keeping the dependency bump and adapting the affected table normalization code and tests.

target.title: chore(deps): bump github.com/slack-go/slack from 0.24.0 to 0.25.0
target.body:
Bumps [github.com/slack-go/slack](https://github.com/slack-go/slack) from 0.24.0 to 0.25.0.
Release notes

Sourced from github.com/slack-go/slack's releases.

v0.25.0

[!IMPORTANT] See CHANGELOG.md for details. Breaking change: TableBlock.Rows is now [][]TableCell (#1558).

What's Changed

  • chore(deps): bump actions/stale from 10.2.0 to 10.3.0 by @​dependabot[bot] in slack-go/slack#1556
  • chore(deps): bump golangci/golangci-lint-action from 9.2.0 to 9.2.1 by @​dependabot[bot] in slack-go/slack#1557
  • fix!: preserve all cell types in TableBlock by @​nlopes in slack-go/slack#1560
  • refactor: replace interface{} with any (Go 1.18+) by @​MD-Mushfiqur123 in slack-go/slack#1559
  • chore: fix a bunch of issues detected by golangci-lint by @​nlopes in slack-go/slack#1561

New Contributors

  • @​MD-Mushfiqur123 made their first contribution in slack-go/slack#1559

Full Changelog: https://github.com/slack-go/slack/compare/v0.24.0...v0.25.0

Changelog

Sourced from github.com/slack-go/slack's changelog.

[0.25.0]

Changed

[!WARNING] Breaking change.

  • TableBlock.Rows is now [][]TableCell (was [][]*RichTextBlock), so table blocks no longer drop raw_text, raw_number, and null cells (#1558).
Commits
  • f2af58e chore: bump to v0.25.0
  • 77b2103 chore: fix flaky test
  • a7d1210 chore: fix a bunch of issues detected by golangci-lint (#1561)
  • f4bffa8 refactor: replace interface{} with any (Go 1.18+) (#1559)
  • af28090 fix!: preserve all cell types in TableBlock (#1560)
  • 98066ee chore(deps): bump golangci/golangci-lint-action from 9.2.0 to 9.2.1 (#1557)
  • 43c28d8 chore(deps): bump actions/stale from 10.2.0 to 10.3.0 (#1556)
  • See full diff in compare view

[![Dependabot compatibility score](https://dependabot-badges.githubapp.com/badges/compatibility_score?dependency-name=github.com/slack-go/slack&package-manager=go_modules&previous-version=0.24.0&new-version=0.25.0)](https://docs.github.com/en/github/managing-security-vulnerabilities/about-dependabot-security-updates#about-compatibility-scores) Dependabot will resolve any conflicts with this PR as long as you don't alter it yourself. You can also trigger a rebase manually by commenting `@dependabot rebase`. [//]: # (dependabot-automerge-start) [//]: # (dependabot-automerge-end) ---
Dependabot commands and options
You can trigger Dependabot actions by commenting on this PR: - `@dependabot rebase` will rebase this PR - `@dependabot recreate` will recreate this PR, overwriting any edits that have been made to it - `@dependabot show ignore conditions` will show all of the ignore conditions of the specified dependency - `@dependabot ignore this major version` will close this PR and stop Dependabot creating any more for this major version (unless you reopen the PR or upgrade to it yourself) - `@dependabot ignore this minor version` will close this PR and stop Dependabot creating any more for this minor version (unless you reopen the PR or upgrade to it yourself) - `@dependabot ignore this dependency` will close this PR and stop Dependabot creating any more for this dependency (unless you reopen the PR or upgrade to it yourself)
